description: Style Note Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Product Details Handbag with a press button fastened flap, decorative metal buckles and a lock Has a short braided handle to carry ease and style  One main compartment with magnetic button closure, has a zippered pocket and organizer sleeves inside Two pockets on the front with magnetic button closures Metal feet on base Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 31 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 11 cm
